abilities.name: Karmic Ties
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage from an enemy model, an enemy model with a Karmic Fate upgrade attached is dealt an equal amount of damage.

abilities.name: Laugh Off
abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.

actions.name: Tekkō-Kagi
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an attached Karmic Fate upgrade, damage from this action is irreducible.

triggers.name: Paper in the Wind
triggers.text: Summon a Katashiro in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Marked
triggers.text: The target gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Revitalize
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. Remove a token from the target. If this action receives a raise, remove any number of tokens from the target.

triggers.name: Caged Curse
triggers.text: If an enemy token was removed, summon a Katashiro in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Unraveled Ward
triggers.text: Kill a Katashiro within range. This model heals 3.

actions.name: Unnatural Speed
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Bound by Karma
triggers.text: Attach a Karmic Fate upgrade to an enemy model within 2" of this model.

triggers.name: Paper in the Wind
triggers.text: Summon a Katashiro in base contact with this model.
